title: Firewall Design Engineer L4 (Contract ) Rotational Shift
description:
Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, upgrade, monitor, and troubleshoot enterprise and banking network infrastructure including routers, switches, firewalls, servers, WIFI, and storage connectivity.
  • Provide L3 L4 support for complex network and system incidents, including escalation handling, root cause analysis, and PDCA based reporting.
  • Design and deploy secure, high availability network solutions covering switching, routing, security, redundancy, and branch connectivity.
  • Lead and support network related projects including solution design, project planning, customer discussions, and implementation.
  • Manage vendors and suppliers, coordinate delivery, and handle technical escalations.
  • Support banking business requirements with secure and compliant network solutions.
  • Prepare and maintain technical and project documentation including diagrams, BOM, implementation plans, configuration and operation manuals.
  • Provide support across IT outsourcing environments and multi branch customer networks.

Requirements

  • Minimum of 6 years of experience in Network & Firewall Design
  • Proven L3 L4 Network Engineering experience in Banking or Financial Services domain.
  • Strong hands on expertise in TCP IP, L2 L3 technologies, OSPF, BGP, MPLS, IPSec and SSL VPNs.
  • CCNP Routing and Switching or equivalent expert level knowledge.
  • Experience with enterprise networking and security vendors including Cisco, FortiGate, Palo Alto, Ubiquiti, PepLink, and Synology.
  • Hands on experience with network security services such as Zscaler, Cisco ASA with Firepower, and next generation firewalls.
  • Working knowledge of Microsoft Azure and AWS networking including VNET peering, UDR routing, and VM deployment.
  • Experience supporting large scale environments with 400 plus users or multi branch networks.
  • Exposure to project management and IT outsourcing environments.
  • Experience with servers, backup, endpoint security, CCTV, PABX, or access control systems is an advantage.
  • Certifications required - CCIE, CCNP, CCSC
  • Rotational shift - 6.00am - 3.00pm / 2.00pm - 11.00pm / 10.00pm - 7.00am.

postedCompany.description:
Tangspac Consulting is an award-winning professional staffing firm with a 20-year footprint in Asia and headquarters in Singapore dating back to 1993. It offers bespoke contingency search and professional services across various Finance & Technology sectors. 

Our team of consultants has unparalleled expertise and track-record in serving both buy-side and sell-side firms, including the largest names on Wall Street. We have successfully placed thousands of banking professionals across various business & technology verticals. Clients range from Corporate & Investment Banks, Asset Managers, Custodians, Trusts, Private Banks, to other Publicly Traded Companies.
 

Tangspac is a founding member of The Association of Professional Staffing Companies (APSCo) Asia, which is a trade body originally established in the UK that maintains close relationships with key government departments and agencies on behalf of the professional staffing industry.
postedCompany.name: TANGSPAC CONSULTING PTE LTD
